sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_time DateTime);
UPDATE test_dates SET date_time = addMicroseconds(date_time, 500000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, addMicroseconds(date_time, 1000000) AS updated_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, addMicroseconds(toString(date_time), 2000000) AS updated_time_string FROM test_dates;
